description_long: This is a plush toy figure resembling a character made from brown, knitted fabric, with a large, rounded head and a small, squat body. The surface is textured to mimic a woven or crocheted pattern, complete with visible white stitching along the seams, especially around the head. The face features two large, round black eyes and a wide, black mouth with a pink tongue, giving it a cheerful and friendly expression. The front of the body displays a white zipper detail, adding to the crafted, handmade appearance. The arms and legs are short and slightly bent, with the hands and feet shaped simply. The overall look is whimsical and inviting, suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban environments.
description: A brown, knitted plush toy with a large head, black eyes, a wide smile, and a white zipper detail on its chest. The surface is textured to resemble woven fabric with visible stitching.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smiling face, black eyes, pink tongue, and white zipper detail on the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rounded head, visible stitching, and the profile of the face and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and body, with prominent white stitching along the head seam.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, mouth, and the side of the limbs with detailed stitching.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with a wide, open-mouthed smile and large, round black eyes. The mouth is slightly curved upward, and a pink tongue is visible.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent and extended downward, and legs apart for balance. The head is facing forward.
